description: Step-level log schema v1 contract for the agent-delivery-harness (issue #219). Machine-readable authority for the harness local log stream (log.jsonl), a sibling of the frozen span schema (trace-schema.v1.json). A DISTINCT schema so a shared validator can never confuse a log line for a span: its version key is log_schema_version (a JSON number), NOT the span schema's schema_version. Traces carry shape; logs carry detail — the two-stream OTel split. Parsed with jq by tests/scripts/test_log_schema.sh.

notes.field_names: Common fields are flat dotted keys (e.g. "harness.issue", "harness.lifecycle_step") following the same OpenTelemetry-aligned naming as the span schema, jq-addressable as .["harness.issue"].
notes.timestamp_format: timestamp is an ISO 8601 UTC string, e.g. 2026-07-04T12:00:00Z (shell: date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ).
notes.extra_fields: Unknown extra fields are allowed on a log record (open-world for additions); the closed levels enum and required_common set below are frozen.
notes.two_stream_split: Traces are the shape stream (span vocabulary, closed enums, one line per span); logs are the detail stream (free-form message plus structured payload, one line per step-level event). A log record MAY reference the span it belongs to via span_id/parent_span_id, but it is never a span and never carries schema_version.

optional_fields.harness.lifecycle_step: string; the lifecycle step the record was emitted under, drawn from the span schema's lifecycle_steps enum (trace-schema.v1.json).
optional_fields.harness.stage: string; sub-stage label within a gate or lifecycle operation (e.g. push, rebase, ci_checks, review_gate, completion_check).
optional_fields.span_id: string; id of the span this log record is associated with, when known, linking the detail stream back to the shape stream.
optional_fields.parent_span_id: string; id of the enclosing span when known, mirroring the span schema's linkage field.
optional_fields.harness.session_id: string; runtime/conversation session identity, aligned with the span schema's harness.session_id.
optional_fields.payload: object or string; the free-form structured detail for this record (command excerpt, result excerpt, diagnostic context). High-leakage: redacted then length-capped per the redaction rule below.
optional_fields.harness.version: string; the harness SemVer release read from the top-level VERSION file (fallback 0.0.0-dev), mirroring the span schema's harness.version.

log_file.format: append-only JSONL, one log record object per line; a sibling of trace.jsonl in the same per-issue directory, pinned to the main checkout root.
log_file.visibility: local-only, never committed; covered by the existing .gitignore rule .copilot-tracking/issues/issue-*/.
log_file.kill_switch: on by default; set HARNESS_LOG=0 to disable log emission entirely.

redaction.rule: redact-before-cap: secret-shaped input (secrets, tokens, .env content, customer-supplied sensitive data) is redacted BEFORE any truncation, so a truncation boundary can never bisect and leak a partially-redacted secret. Redaction always precedes the payload cap.
redaction.payload_cap_note: per-record payload is truncated to a default 4096-byte cap (override via HARNESS_LOG_PAYLOAD_CAP) only AFTER redaction has run.
